safety.secret_policy: Record secret variable names and setup links only. Never store raw keys, tokens, private keys, wallet seed phrases, or customer credentials.
safety.activation_rule: Sandbox first, then limited production pilot, then production active after SEAL review.

swirm_labels.SWIRM_AGENTIC_RUNTIME: agents, command routers, tool execution, project teams
swirm_labels.SWIRM_MCP: model-to-tool protocol, MCP gateway, MCP servers
swirm_labels.SWIRM_MEMORY: long-term memory, RAG, graph memory, embeddings
swirm_labels.SWIRM_AUTOMATION: webhooks, workflows, event routing, queues, schedulers
swirm_labels.SWIRM_IDENTITY: auth, DID, VC, wallets, naming, permissions
swirm_labels.SWIRM_COMMUNICATION: email, chat, social, voice, video, support
swirm_labels.SWIRM_CLOUD: hosting, serverless, edge, containers, cloud runtime
swirm_labels.SWIRM_SECURITY: secrets, scanning, RBAC, policy, logs, incident response
swirm_labels.SWIRM_CRM: leads, customers, sales, support, partner operations
swirm_labels.SWIRM_HARDWARE: IoT, QR/NFC, devices, edge hardware, sensors
swirm_labels.SWIRM_PAYMENTS: billing, invoices, payment links, revenue operations

opportunities.name: OpenAI Platform + Apps SDK + Codex route
opportunities.access_method: API key, SDK, ChatGPT Apps SDK, Codex connected to GitHub repos
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Billing may be required. Use provider gateway, budget caps, model allowlist, and per-command cost logs.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Keep as core intelligence provider. Use Codex for repo tasks only after branch, PR, and test gates. External actions remain human-approved.

opportunities.name: Anthropic Claude + MCP ecosystem
opportunities.access_method: API key behind ABBA provider router; MCP only through allowlisted gateway
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Typically paid. Use as specialist route and fallback, not uncontrolled default.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Add to model-router with evals. Route MCP calls through sandbox, command allowlist, and audit logs.

opportunities.name: OpenRouter model routing
opportunities.access_method: OpenAI-compatible API key
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Some free or low-cost models may be available; enforce model allowlist and spending caps.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Activate as experimentation and fallback lane; promote models only after quality, privacy, and cost tests.

opportunities.name: Google Gemini / Vertex AI
opportunities.access_method: API key for AI Studio or Google Cloud service account for Vertex AI
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: AI Studio is low-hassle for dev; Vertex production usage may bill.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for multimodal Google workflows and Workspace-aware intelligence through permissioned OAuth routes.

opportunities.name: ABBA MCP Gateway
opportunities.access_method: Self-hosted gateway with container sandbox, network egress policy, command allowlist, and per-tool SEAL level
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source path is free but operational security cost is high.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Do not expose arbitrary MCP servers. Start with read-only GitHub, filesystem sandbox, Postgres read-only, and docs search.

opportunities.name: GitHub REST/GraphQL/Webhooks/GitHub Apps/Actions
opportunities.access_method: GitHub App or fine-grained token; webhook receiver in n8n/Cloudflare/Vercel
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free for many repo workflows; private org scale may need paid GitHub plans.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use GitHub App with least privilege. Gate writes through PRs and branch protection.

opportunities.name: Supabase Postgres/Auth/Storage/Realtime/Edge Functions/Vector
opportunities.access_method: Project URL + anon key client-side; service role server-side only; Postgres connection for migrations
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free tier available; production needs backups, quotas, RLS, and monitoring.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Primary data plane. Enforce RLS, migrations, backup policy, service-role isolation, and schema registry.

opportunities.name: n8n Cloud/Self-hosted workflow automation
opportunities.access_method: Hosted n8n or self-hosted instance with webhook URL and API key
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Self-hosted path can be low-cost/free except infrastructure; managed cloud bills by plan/execution.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Upgrade before exposure, require auth on webhooks, IP allowlist sensitive routes, disable public test endpoints, log every external action.

opportunities.name: Cloudflare Workers/Pages/R2/D1/Queues/Vectorize/AI/Gateway
opportunities.access_method: Cloudflare account, Wrangler CLI, API token, Git integration
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Strong free/low-cost path for edge apps; production usage may bill by requests/storage.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as edge gateway, webhook firewall, AI gateway, static/admin app hosting, and low-latency routing layer.

opportunities.name: Vercel deployment/runtime
opportunities.access_method: GitHub import + Vercel project token/env vars
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free/hobby tier useful for MVP; commercial production may require paid plan.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Keep as primary frontend deployment lane with preview URLs and environment separation.

opportunities.name: LangGraph / LangChain
opportunities.access_method: Python/JS SDK in backend worker or agent service
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source framework; model/API costs separate.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for ABBA command graph only after defining state schema, tool permission registry, and replayable traces.

opportunities.name: LlamaIndex RAG framework
opportunities.access_method: Python/TypeScript SDK with vector store backend
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Framework free; storage/model usage separate.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for Carbon Actual knowledge base, source-linked evidence, and document Q&A with citation logging.

opportunities.name: Qdrant vector database
opportunities.access_method: HTTP/gRPC API, SDK, local Docker, or managed cloud
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Self-host free; cloud free tier may be available depending on account/region.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as first dedicated vector memory store when Supabase pgvector limits are reached.

opportunities.name: Neo4j graph database
opportunities.access_method: Bolt/HTTP driver or managed Aura instance
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Community/self-host and limited cloud tiers may be available; production managed plans may bill.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for Swirm dependency graph, people/orgs/projects, proof chains, and inter-Swirm collaboration maps.

opportunities.name: Zep / Graphiti temporal memory
opportunities.access_method: Hosted API or self-hosted components
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source components available; hosted production may bill.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for ABBA MAS memory after privacy model, retention rules, and user consent boundaries are defined.

opportunities.name: Infisical secrets management
opportunities.access_method: Hosted or self-hosted vault; CLI/SDK/API injection into deployments
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source self-host path; hosted tiers vary.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Promote immediately as central secret registry; migrate raw env secrets out of ad hoc stores.

opportunities.name: Keycloak IAM
opportunities.access_method: OIDC/OAuth client integration with hosted/self-hosted realm
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free open-source; hosting and management cost apply.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use when ABBA needs enterprise SSO/multi-tenant identity beyond Supabase Auth.

opportunities.name: W3C DID + Verifiable Credentials
opportunities.access_method: DID methods, VC issuer/verifier service, wallet or agent credential store
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Standards are free; implementation, custody, and compliance add cost.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Start with non-financial internal credentials: agent role credentials, contributor proofs, project attestations. No public identity issuance until governance is written.

opportunities.name: ENS / Handshake naming routes
opportunities.access_method: Wallet, registrar app/API, resolver configuration
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Registration/renewal fees and gas may apply.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Reserve/route names only after brand/legal review. Use multisig and never expose private keys.

opportunities.name: Base + thirdweb + Safe tokenization/proof path
opportunities.access_method: Wallet/multisig, RPC provider, smart contract SDK/API
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Testnets are free except faucets/limits; mainnet gas and platform fees may apply.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use testnet only first. Mainnet minting requires written token policy, multisig, legal review, and release checklist.

opportunities.name: Hyperledger FireFly enterprise blockchain gateway
opportunities.access_method: Self-hosted FireFly node/API with blockchain connector
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source; infrastructure and chain costs apply.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for enterprise proof pilots, not early MVP. Begin with local dev network and non-financial attestations.

opportunities.name: Resend transactional email
opportunities.access_method: API key and verified domain
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free tier may exist; production sending volume may require paid plan and domain setup.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for system notifications after SPF/DKIM/DMARC, unsubscribe rules where applicable, and human approval on cold outbound.

opportunities.name: Twilio Voice/SMS/WhatsApp programmable communications
opportunities.access_method: Account SID/Auth token, verified numbers, webhook URLs
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Trial accounts exist with limits; production messages/calls are usage billed.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use only for opted-in support and verification. Phone calls require explicit human approval and call outcome logging.

opportunities.name: Meta WhatsApp Business Cloud API
opportunities.access_method: Meta app, access token, phone number ID, webhook verification
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Conversation/template pricing and policy restrictions apply; support use is safer than general AI chatbot distribution.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Activate only as business support route with consent, approved templates, logging, and human escalation.

opportunities.name: LiveKit realtime voice/video agents
opportunities.access_method: API key/secret, SDK, self-hosted or cloud LiveKit project
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source self-host path; cloud tiers may include free/dev allowances.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for demos and internal voice agents first. Recordings/transcripts need consent and retention policy.

opportunities.name: Twenty CRM open-source CRM
opportunities.access_method: Self-host or cloud, REST API, database sync
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source/self-host option; managed cloud paid tiers may apply.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as candidate CRM if HubSpot/Odoo are too heavy. Start with partner/contact pipeline.

opportunities.name: Odoo ERP/CRM
opportunities.access_method: Odoo cloud/self-host, XML-RPC/JSON-RPC API, modules
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Community edition self-host is free; enterprise/apps/hosting can bill.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use when Carbon Actual needs ERP depth. Start with CRM + invoicing pilot only.

opportunities.name: Directus data studio/headless CMS
opportunities.access_method: Self-host/cloud, REST/GraphQL API, database connection
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Self-host path available; managed cloud pricing may apply.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for internal admin panels and content/control surfaces over existing SQL data.

opportunities.name: Appsmith internal app builder
opportunities.access_method: Self-host/cloud, connect APIs/databases, app permissions
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Community/self-host path available; cloud/enterprise features may bill.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for ABBA owner dashboards, Swirm control panels, and ops tools before custom admin builds.

opportunities.name: NocoDB / Baserow open-source Airtable alternatives
characteristics: less strict than SQL app schema
opportunities.access_method: Self-host/cloud API and UI tables
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source/self-host options; hosted usage may bill.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use as non-critical registry/admin surface; promote canonical records into Supabase/Postgres.

opportunities.name: Stripe Billing/Checkout/Webhooks
opportunities.access_method: Secret key server-side, publishable key client-side, webhook signing secret
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: No setup fee for many flows; transaction/platform fees apply.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Sandbox first. Production requires refund policy, tax/accounting flow, webhook verification, and finance approval.

opportunities.name: PostHog product analytics
opportunities.access_method: Client/server SDK with project API key; optional self-host
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free tier/open-source path exists; usage-based billing may apply.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Add to public apps after privacy banner/policy and event taxonomy. Disable sensitive field capture.

opportunities.name: Sentry error monitoring
opportunities.access_method: SDK DSN and release integration
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Free/developer tiers may exist; production volume may bill.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Activate across production apps with PII scrubbing and release tagging.

opportunities.name: Wazuh security monitoring
opportunities.access_method: Self-hosted manager and agents on servers/endpoints
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Open-source; infrastructure and managed support cost optional.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for self-hosted production infrastructure after baseline cloud monitoring is stable.

opportunities.name: MQTT/Home Assistant/Node-RED edge integration path
opportunities.access_method: MQTT broker, webhooks, local gateway, device credentials
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Software is free/open-source; hardware and hosting costs apply.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for Carbon Actual physical proof pilots: sensor readings, QR/NFC check-ins, field evidence, and device heartbeat logs.

opportunities.name: Hugging Face models/datasets/spaces
opportunities.access_method: Access token, SDK, hosted inference, Spaces app
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: Many free/open models and Spaces options; hosted inference/GPU usage may bill.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for model scouting, demos, embedding experiments, and open-model fallback after license/security review.

opportunities.name: Base44 / Lovable rapid app builders
opportunities.access_method: Connected app builder account, GitHub/export route where available, API/backend credentials as env vars
opportunities.cost_free_tier_notes: May offer trial/free tiers; production/custom domains may bill.
opportunities.recommended_activation_path: Use for prototypes and white-label demos; production must be exported or audited, with secrets moved to controlled env storage.

inter_swirm_team_templates.label: Product Build Team
inter_swirm_team_templates.example_command: Build, test, deploy and monitor a new Carbon Actual app module.

inter_swirm_team_templates.label: Carbon Proof Field Team
inter_swirm_team_templates.example_command: Capture field evidence, verify identity, timestamp proof, and prepare a certificate.

inter_swirm_team_templates.label: Customer Operations Team
inter_swirm_team_templates.example_command: Handle lead intake, route support, draft replies, update CRM and summarize outcomes.

inter_swirm_team_templates.label: Trust / Identity / Tokenization Team
inter_swirm_team_templates.example_command: Issue a verified credential or testnet proof token after policy and human SEAL approval.

recommended_next_registry_actions: Merge promoted entries into data/production_swirm_integration_opportunities.json after duplicate check.
Add automated validation that every opportunity has setup_links, access_method, secret_names_only, risk_level, seal_level and recommended_activation_path.
Create /api/integrations/opportunities endpoint filtered by swirm, risk, SEAL, activation status and cost profile.
Create Swirm team router schema so apps can belong to multiple Swirms and temporary teams can form for commands.
Add security gate: high/critical risk and SEAL_4/SEAL_5 opportunities cannot move to production without human approval evidence.
